steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Two cases for $2|5x-1|=5x+9$. Case 1: $\left(2\right)(5x-1)=5x+9$ gives $x=11/5$. Case 2: $-2(5x-1)=5x+9$ gives $x=-7/15$. Both check valid.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The two solutions are $11/5$ and $-7/15$, and their sum is $26/15,1.733$. Therefore the value to enter is $26/15,1.733$.
